title: Dimension mismatch in Supabase Vector Store
symptom: When attempting to insert data into the Supabase Vector Store, an error occurs indicating a dimension mismatch between expected and actual embeddings.
not_this_if: Using correct embedding dimensions as per the model
root_cause: The error arises because the embedding dimensions of the data being inserted do not match the expected dimensions defined in the Supabase Vector Store. In this case, the model expects 1536 dimensions, but the provided data only has 768 dimensions.
fix_steps: Delete the existing table in Supabase that is causing the error
Adjust the embedding dimensions in your code to match the model's requirement (768)
Run the code again to insert the data
agent_instruction: Delete the old table and adjust the embedding dimensions to 768 before re-running the code.
safety_notes: Deleting the table will result in data loss for that table.
